subject: fix(nav): align header content with container edges
body:
The nav had no horizontal padding, so the logo and burger button sat
flush at the viewport edges while <main class="container"> content was
inset by 1rem (mobile) or centered with max-width (desktop). This
created visual misalignment between header and content.

Added horizontal padding matching Pico's container padding
(--pico-spacing: 1rem), using max() to respect safe-area-insets on
notch devices.

Tags: ui, spacing, css
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: header-polish
Semver: patch
